{{Quote|I never eat my guests -- at least not without tea, and you've just missed that.|Shalera the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Shalera''', known as "'''Lady Hutt'''" because she identified as [[Gender/Legends|female]], was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who abided by a moral code; a rare trait for her species. Formerly a member of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], she joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].

==Biography==
[[File:Shalera.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Shalera with her minions.]]

Though she had installations throughout the planet [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], the Lady Hutt could often be found running her operations from the back room of the cantina in [[Tyrena/Legends|Tyrena]]. Shalera often protected [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] and had her guards escort their operatives to safe bases. Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Shalera's partnership with the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] began to waver. The Black Sun's greed began to interfere with business, something Shalera did not tolerate.

At some point a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Ubis Reendorr]] hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to steal a shipment of [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s from Shalera's warehouse on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. At the warehouse the spacer was surprised to find not only a dozen of pirates and thugs, but also Shalera herself. A firefight ensued, during which the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] escaped and her guards were defeated, which allowed the spacer to bring the shipment to Reendorr.<ref name="LS">{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force|scenario=Light Side scenario campaign}}</ref>
